1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (national table) with geometry

4.description: get 200-year flood zone polygons (flomareal) with geometry and gjentaksintervall=200

5.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand by intersection with municipality geometry

6.description: reduce flood polygons to Kristiansand by intersection with municipality geometry

7.description: find buildings that intersect reduced storm-surge polygons

8.description: find buildings that intersect reduced flood polygons

9.description: find buildings present in both intersection results (intersect both hazards)

10.description: sort by bygningid ascending and limit to 10
